\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{lscape}
\usepackage{geometry}

\geometry{a4paper, margin=1in}

\begin{document}

%\begin{landscape}

\scriptsize % Reduce the font size to fit the table within the borders

\begin{tabular}{|p{1.5cm}|p{2.5cm}|p{2.5cm}|p{2.5cm}|p{2.5cm}|p{3cm}|}
\hline
\textbf{Score} & \textbf{1} & \textbf{2} & \textbf{3} & \textbf{4} & \textbf{5} \\
\hline
\textbf{Faithfulness} &
$>4$ significant inaccuracies and misrepresents the content from the input.&
[3--4] significant inaccuracies or misrepresentations of the content. &
[1--2] inaccuracies or minor misrepresentations. &
1 minor inaccuracy or omission. &
Perfectly reflects the gist of the input without missing or incorrectly modifying any key information.\ \\
\hline
\textbf{Examples} &
Misinterprets key data points; significant factual errors in more than 4 instances. &
Omits key trends; some incorrect interpretations in 3-4 instances. &
Covers main points but with 1-2 minor errors; some data misinterpreted. &
Accurate but misses minor details; slight data misrepresentation in 1 instance. &
Fully accurate; no missing or incorrect information. \\
\hline
\textbf{Coverage} &
Fails to cover most of the main content, includes more than 4 irrelevant pieces of information, and misses key points. &
Covers some key points but misses many important aspects, including 3-4 irrelevant pieces of information or not present in the input. &
Covers most of the main content but lacks depth in 1-2 areas, including some extraneous information or not present in the input. &
Covers all key points with sufficient depth and includes only 1 minor irrelevant piece of information or not present in the input. &
Perfectly reflects the main content from the input without adding any irrelevant information or not present in the input.\\
\hline
\textbf{Examples} &
Includes more than 4 irrelevant data points or not present in the input; ignores key trends. &
Misses many important points; includes 3-4 irrelevant pieces of information or not present in the input. &
Covers main points but lacks depth; includes 1-2 irrelevant pieces of information or not present in the input. &
Comprehensive with only 1 extraneous detail or not present in the input. &
Thorough and relevant coverage without irrelevant details or not present in the input. \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

%\end{landscape}

\end{document}
